seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 12 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 12 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 4440625926802919322 | random seed to reproduce generated values

testcase.name: register DuplicateEmail ThrowsDuplicateEmailExceptionAndRepositoryUnchanged
